---
title: "About"
image: profile_photo.jpg
about:
  template: solana
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/phanav
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/phanav
    - icon: mortarboard-fill
      text: Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=ULsVXd0AAAAJ&hl=en
---

My name is Phan Anh Vu (Vũ).

I have studied Mathematics, Computer Science, Economics and Finance. 
I took a Software Engineer position for a few years. 
Most recently, I mainly work on Machine Learning. 
More specifically, the research topic for my PhD is the intersection of probabilistic machine learning and chip design. 
The goal is to accelerate uncertainty quantification algorithms with specialized and emerging hardware, both analog and digital. 
Here are a few samples from my long list of hobbies: Dance (hiphop, latin), Music (vocal, piano, guitar), tennis.

Below is a probably outdated Curriculum Vitae

[https://www.overleaf.com/read/ttktcnyrwtjv](https://www.overleaf.com/read/ttktcnyrwtjv)
